findings.evidence: Lines 77-80 use only `Quotient.map' id` and `MulAction.orbitRel_apply`; no `Deck`, topology, fibre, or covering-specific fact appears in the proof.
findings.fix: Prove a generic `MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient.mapOfLE`-style definition and `refl`/`comp` lemmas for arbitrary `G`, `α`, `[MulAction G α]`, then define the deck-fibre map as that specialization.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE` and its `refl`/`comp` lemmas are specialized to `H K : Subgroup (Deck p)` and a fibre, although the construction is the generic map from `orbitRel.Quotient H α` to `orbitRel.Quotient K α` for any subgroup inclusion acting on any type.

summary: The subgroup fibre quotient itself is appropriately deck-specific, but part of the exposed API is proved at an unnecessarily special deck-fibre level instead of the natural orbit-quotient level.
